requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Asset Reconstruction
Companies) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Asset Reconstruction Companies) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of
the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: the day they are placed on the website of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to every Asset Reconstruction Company
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ARCs' and individually as an 'ARC') registered with
the Reserve Bank under Section 3 of the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial
Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002.
requirements.object: Asset Reconstruction Company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ARCs' and individually as an 'ARC') registered with the

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below --
(1) 'Act' means the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and
Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002 (54 of 2002).
requirements.object: to them below -- (1) 'Act' means the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Inte

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Breakup value' means the equity capital and reserves as reduced by intangible
assets and revaluation reserves, divided by the number of equity shares of the investee
company.
requirements.object: reserves as reduced by intangible assets and revaluation reserves, divided by the number of equity shares of the investee compa

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) 'Change in management' means effecting change by the borrower at the instance
of ARC in the person who has responsibility for the whole or substantially whole of the
management of the business of the borrower and/ or other relevant personnel.
requirements.object: borrower at the instance of ARC in the person who has responsibility for the whole or substantially whole of the management of

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'Date of acquisition' means the date on which the ownership of financial assets is
acquired by ARC either on its own books or directly in the books of the trust.
requirements.object: the ownership of financial assets is acquired by ARC either on its own books or directly in the books of the trust

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'Deposit' means deposit as defined in the Companies (Acceptance of Deposits)
Rules 2014 framed under Section 73 of the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: the Companies (Acceptance of Deposits) Rules 2014 framed under Section 73 of the Companies Act, 2013

conditions: If an investee company is a loss-making company
requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'Earning value' means the value of an equity share computed by taking the average
of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-ordinary
and non-recurring items, for the immediately preceding 3 years and further divided by the
number of equity shares of the investee company and capitalised at the following rate:
Note: If an investee company is a loss-making company, the earning value shall
be taken as zero.
(7) 'Fair value' means the mean of the earning value and the breakup value.
requirements.object: earning value and the breakup value

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) 'Net owned fund' (hereinafter referred to as 'NOF') means the amount arrived at
by reducing from owned fund, the amounts representing
requirements.object: by reducing from owned fund, the amounts representing

requirements.full_sentence:
Words or expressions used but not defined herein and defined in the Act, shall have
the same meaning as assigned to them in the Act.
requirements.object: as assigned to them in the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
Any other words or expressions not
defined in that Act shall have the same meaning as assigned to them in the Companies
Act, 2013.
requirements.object: as assigned to them in the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall put in place a Board approved policies and establish periodic review
mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems.
requirements.object: Board approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Activities of the ARC: Taking up the role of Resolution Applicant which may, inter
alia, include the scope of activities, internal limit for sectoral exposures, etc.
requirements.object: the scope of activities, internal limit for sectoral exposures, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Financial asset acquisition policy: Policy shall cover, inter alia, procedure for
acquisition, types and desirable profile of assets, valuation procedure and plan for
realisation of financial asset to ensure that transactions take place in a transparent
manner and at a fair price in a well-informed market and the transactions are
executed on arm's length basis by exercise of due diligence.
requirements.object: for acquisition, types and desirable profile of assets, valuation procedure and plan for realisation of financial asset t

requirements.full_sentence:
Before commencement of the business of securitisation or asset reconstruction, an
ARC shall apply for registration and obtain a certificate of registration (CoR) from the
Reserve Bank as provided under Section 3 of the Act.
requirements.object: obtain a certificate of registration (CoR) from the Reserve Bank as provided under Section 3 of the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC seeking registration shall submit its application in the application form hosted
on the Reserve Bank's website, duly filled in with all the relevant annexures/ supporting
documents, to the Chief General Manager-in-Charge, Department of Regulation, Central
Office, Reserve Bank of India, Shahid Bhagat Singh Marg, Fort, Mumbai - 400001 or
online, through PRAVAAH Portal.
requirements.object: the application form hosted on the Reserve Bank's website, duly filled in with all the relevant annexures/ supporting docume

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall commence business within six months from the date of grant of CoR by
the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: months from the date of grant of CoR by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Reserve Bank may grant extension up to twelve months from the date
of grant of CoR on receipt of the application from the ARC.
requirements.object: twelve months from the date of grant of CoR on receipt of the application from the ARC

requirements.full_sentence:
Provisions of Section 45-IA, 45-IB and 45-IC of RBI Act, 1934 shall not apply to an
ARC registered with the Reserve Bank under Section 3 of the Act.
requirements.object: registered with the Reserve Bank under Section 3 of the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
Any entity not registered with the Reserve Bank under Section 3 of the Act may
conduct the business of securitisation or asset reconstruction outside the purview of the
Act subject to requisite authorisation/ approval.
requirements.object: securitisation or asset reconstruction outside the purview of the Act subject to requisite authorisation/ approval

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: There may be instances wherein banks and other financial institutions
undertake certain transactions, which are in the nature of securitisation or asset
reconstruction, wherever these are permitted by their respective laws and regulations.
requirements.object: and other financial institutions undertake certain transactions, which are in the nature of securitisation or asset reconstruction

requirements.full_sentence:
ARC existing as on October 11, 2022 shall achieve the minimum required NOF of
₹300 crore by March 31, 2026.
requirements.object: NOF of ₹300 crore by March 31, 2026

conditions: In case of non-compliance at any of the above stages
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of non-compliance at any of the above stages, the non-complying ARC shall
be subject to supervisory action, including prohibition on undertaking incremental
business till it reaches the required minimum NOF applicable at that time.
requirements.object: action, including prohibition on undertaking incremental business till it reaches the required minimum NOF applicable at tha

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall commence/ undertake only securitisation and asset reconstruction
activities and functions provided under Section 10 of the Act.
requirements.object: and asset reconstruction activities and functions provided under Section 10 of the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
This permission shall
be subject to the following conditions:
(1) The ARC has a minimum NOF of ₹1,000 crore.
requirements.object: following conditions: (1) The ARC has a minimum NOF of ₹1,000 crore

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The ARC shall have a Board-approved policy regarding taking up the role of
Resolution Applicant which may, inter alia, include the scope of activities, internal limit
for sectoral exposures, etc.
requirements.object: regarding taking up the role of Resolution Applicant which may, inter alia, include the scope of activities, internal lim

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A committee comprising of a majority of independent directors shall be constituted
to take decisions on the proposals of submission of resolution plan under IBC.
requirements.object: decisions on the proposals of submission of resolution plan under IBC

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(4) The ARC shall explore the possibility of preparing a panel of sector-specific
management firms/ individuals having expertise in running firms/ companies which
may be considered for managing the firms/ companies, if needed.
requirements.object: preparing a panel of sector-specific management firms/ individuals having expertise in running firms/ companies which may be considered for managing the firms/ companies

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In respect of a specific corporate insolvency resolution process (CIRP), the ARC shall
not retain any significant influence or control over the corporate debtor after five years
from the date of approval of the resolution plan by the Adjudicating Authority under
IBC.
requirements.object: or control over the corporate debtor after five years from the date of approval of the resolution plan by the Adjudic

conditions: In case of non-compliance with this condition
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of non-compliance with this condition, the ARC shall not be allowed to
submit any fresh resolution plans under IBC either as a Resolution Applicant or a
Resolution Co-Applicant.
requirements.object: any fresh resolution plans under IBC either as a Resolution Applicant or a Resolution Co-Applicant

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC may, at its discretion, as a sponsor and for the purpose of establishing a joint
venture, invest in the equity share capital of another ARC.
requirements.object: as a sponsor and for the purpose of establishing a joint venture, invest in the equity share capital of another ARC

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC may, at its discretion, deploy its funds for undertaking restructuring of
acquired loan account with the sole purpose of realizing its dues.
requirements.object: deploy its funds for undertaking restructuring of acquired loan account with the sole purpose of realizing its dues

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC may, at its discretion, deploy any surplus funds available with it, in terms of a
Board-approved policy, in -
(1) Government securities and deposits with scheduled commercial banks, Small
Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI), National Bank for Agriculture and
Rural Development (NABARD) or such other entity as may be specified by the
Reserve Bank from time to time.
requirements.object: deploy any surplus funds available with it, in terms of a Board-approved policy, in - (1) Government securities and deposits with
building except for the following purposes: (1) investment by the ARC in land and building for its own use up to 10 percent of its o

requirements.full_sentence:
Any
land and/ or building acquired by the ARC, in the ordinary course of its business of
asset reconstruction while enforcing its security interest, shall be disposed of within
a period of five years from the date of such acquisition or such extended period as
may be permitted by the Reserve Bank in the interest of realisation of the dues of
the ARC.
requirements.object: a period of five years from the date of such acquisition or such extended period as may be permitted by the Reserve Bank in the

requirements.full_sentence: An ARC shall not raise monies by way of deposit.
requirements.object: of deposit

requirements.timeline:
within 90
days of grant of the CoR which shall provide that transactions take place in a transparent
manner and at a fair price in a well
requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall frame a Board-approved 'financial asset acquisition policy' within 90
days of grant of the CoR which shall provide that transactions take place in a transparent
manner and at a fair price in a well-informed market and the transactions are executed on
arm's length basis by exercise of due diligence.
requirements.object: asset acquisition policy' within 90 days of grant of the CoR which shall provide that transactions take place in a t

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall clearly lay down the policies and
guidelines covering, inter alia, the following:
(1) norms and procedure for acquisition either on its own books or directly in the books
of the trust;
requirements.object: policies and guidelines covering, inter alia, the following: (1) norms and procedure for acquisition either on its own books or d

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board may delegate powers to a committee comprising any director and/ or any
functionaries of the ARC for taking decisions on proposals for acquisition of financial
assets.
requirements.object: committee comprising any director and/ or any functionaries of the ARC for taking decisions on proposals for acquisition of finan

requirements.full_sentence: Deviation from the policy shall be made only with the approval of the Board.
requirements.object: the approval of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Before bidding for the stressed assets, an ARC may seek adequate time, of not less
than two weeks, from the auctioning banks to conduct a meaningful due diligence of the
account by verifying the underlying assets.
requirements.object: not less than two weeks, from the auctioning banks to conduct a meaningful due diligence of the account by verifying the underl

requirements.full_sentence:
The share of financial assets to be acquired from the bank/ financial institution shall be
appropriately and objectively worked out keeping in view the provision in the Act requiring
consent of secured creditors holding not less than 60 percent of the amount outstanding
to a borrower for the purpose of enforcement of security interest.
requirements.object: worked out keeping in view the provision in the Act requiring consent of secured creditors holding not less than 60 p

requirements.full_sentence:
For easy and faster realisability, all the financial assets due from a single debtor to
<image>
various banks/financial institutions may be considered for acquisition.

Similarly, financial
assets having linkages to the same collateral may be considered for acquisition to ensure
relatively faster and easy realisation.
requirements.object: to ensure relatively faster and easy realisation

requirements.full_sentence:
Both fund and non-fund based financial assets may be included in the list of assets
for acquisition.
requirements.object: list of assets for acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
Assets classified as special mentioned accounts (SMAs) in the books of
the originator may also be acquired.

Acquisition of funded assets shall not include takeover of outstanding commitments, if
any, of any bank / financial institution to lend further.
requirements.object: commitments

requirements.full_sentence:
Terms of acquisition of security
interest in non-fund transactions shall provide for the relative commitments to continue
with bank / financial institution till demand for funding arises.
requirements.object: commitments to continue with bank / financial institution till demand for funding arises

requirements.full_sentence: As far as possible, the valuation process shall be uniform for assets of same profile.
requirements.object: of same profile

requirements.full_sentence:
It
shall be ensured that the valuation of the financial assets is done in a scientific and
objective manner.
requirements.object: valuation of the financial assets is done in a scientific and objective manner

requirements.full_sentence:
Valuation may be done either internally or by engaging an independent
agency, depending upon the value of the assets.
requirements.object: or by engaging an independent agency, depending upon the value of the assets

requirements.full_sentence:
Ideally, valuation may be entrusted to
the committee authorised to approve acquisition of assets, which may carry out the task
in line with financial asset acquisition policy mentioned at paragraph 24.
requirements.object: committee authorised to approve acquisition of assets, which may carry out the task in line with financial asset acquisition polic
financial asset to another ARC subject to the following conditions: (1) The transaction is settled on cash basis

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Price discovery for such transaction shall not be prejudicial to the interest of SR
holders;
requirements.object: interest of SR holders

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The selling ARC shall utilize the proceeds so received for the redemption of
underlying security receipts (SRs);
requirements.object: received for the redemption of underlying security receipts (SRs)

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(4) The date of redemption of underlying SRs and total period of realisation shall not
extend beyond eight years from the date of acquisition of the financial asset by the
first ARC.
requirements.object: from the date of acquisition of the financial asset by the first ARC

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall not acquire financial assets from the following on a bilateral basis,
whatever may be the consideration:
<image>
(1) a bank/ financial institution which is the sponsor of the ARC;
requirements.object: the following on a bilateral basis, whatever may be the consideration: <image> (1) a bank/ financial institution which i

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that they may participate in the auctions of the financial assets provided such
auctions are conducted in a transparent manner, on arm's length basis and the prices are
determined by the market forces.
requirements.object: the auctions of the financial assets provided such auctions are conducted in a transparent manner, on arm's length basis and t
period, formulate a plan for realisation of assets which may provide for one or more of the following measures: (1) Change in or

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC shall formulate the policy for realisation of financial assets under which the
period for realisation shall not exceed five years from the date of acquisition of the
financial asset concerned.
requirements.object: the date of acquisition of the financial asset concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the Board of the ARC may increase the period for realisation of financial
assets so that the total period for realisation shall not exceed eight years from the date of
acquisition of the financial asset concerned.
requirements.object: the date of acquisition of the financial asset concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
In case, the ARC is one of the lenders in an account, where a resolution plan has
been finalised and the same extends beyond the maximum resolution period allowed for
ARCs as per paragraph 36 above, the ARC may accept a resolution period co-terminus
with other secured lenders.
requirements.object: co-terminus with other secured lenders

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of the ARC shall specify the steps that shall be taken by the ARC to realise
the financial assets within the time frame referred to in the paragraph 36 above as the
<image>
case may be.
requirements.object: shall be taken by the ARC to realise the financial assets within the time frame referred to in the paragraph 36 above as the <i

requirements.full_sentence:
The qualified buyers (QBs) shall be entitled to invoke the provisions of Section 7(3) of
the Act only at the end of such extended period if the period for realisation is extended
under paragraph 36 above.
requirements.object: the provisions of Section 7(3) of the Act only at the end of such extended period if the period for realisation is extended unde

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC may resort to change in or takeover of the management of the business of
the borrower for the purpose of realisation of its dues from the borrower subject to the
provisions of these guidelines.
requirements.object: or takeover of the management of the business of the borrower for the purpose of realisation of its dues from the borrower subject

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall follow these instructions while exercising the powers conferred on them
under Section 9(1)(a) of the Act.
requirements.object: exercising the powers conferred on them under Section 9(1)(a) of the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC resorting to takeover of management of the
business of the borrower shall do so after complying with the manner of takeover of the
management in accordance with the provisions of Section 15 of the Act.
requirements.object: with the manner of takeover of the management in accordance with the provisions of Section 15 of the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
On realisation of its dues in full, the ARC shall restore the management of the business
to the borrower as provided in Section 15(4) of the Act.
requirements.object: the business to the borrower as provided in Section 15(4) of the Act

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if any ARC has converted part of its debt into shares of a borrower company
and thereby acquired controlling interest in the borrower company, such ARC shall not
be liable to restore the management of the business to such borrower.
requirements.object: the management of the business to such borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
An ARC shall be entitled to effect change in management or takeover of the
management of business of the borrower on any of the following grounds:
(1) the borrower defaults in repayment of the amount due under the relevant loan
agreement/s in following circumstances:
Explanation: For the purpose of this paragraph, the default by the borrower must
be deliberate and calculated as detailed above.
requirements.object: change in management or takeover of the management of business of the borrower on any of the following grounds: (1) the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC shall keep in view the
track record of the borrower and the decision regarding such defaults by the
borrower should not be based on isolated transactions/ incidents which are not
material.
requirements.object: track record of the borrower and the decision regarding such defaults by the borrower should not be based on isolated transactions/ i

conditions:
where the amount due to it from the borrower is not less than 25 percent
of the total assets owned by the borrower
requirements.full_sentence:
In the circumstances set forth in paragraph 44 above,
(1) an ARC may effect change in or takeover of the management of the business of the
borrower, where the amount due to it from the borrower is not less than 25 percent
of the total assets owned by the borrower;
requirements.object: takeover of the management of the business of the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'Total assets' means total assets as disclosed in its latest audited
balance sheet immediately preceding the date of taking action.
requirements.object: in its latest audited balance sheet immediately preceding the date of taking action

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC shall have a Board-approved policy regarding change in or takeover of the
management of the business of the borrower and the borrowers shall be made aware of
such policy of the ARC.
requirements.object: regarding change in or takeover of the management of the business of the borrower and the borrowers shall be made aware o

requirements.full_sentence:
This policy shall, inter alia, include the following aspects:
(1) The ARC shall carry out due diligence exercise and record the details of the exercise,
including the findings on the circumstances which had led to default in repayment of
the dues by the borrower and why the decision to change in or takeover of the
management of the business of the borrower has become necessary.
requirements.object: the following aspects: (1) The ARC shall carry out due diligence exercise and record the details of the exercise, including the

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The change in or takeover of the management of the business of the borrower shall
be done only after the proposal is examined by an Independent Advisory Committee
(IAC) to be appointed by the ARC consisting of professionals having technical /
finance / legal background.
requirements.object: the proposal is examined by an Independent Advisory Committee (IAC) to be appointed by the ARC consisting of professionals having t

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: To ensure independence of members of IAC, such members should
not be connected with the affairs of the ARC in any manner and should not receive
any pecuniary benefit from the ARC except for the services rendered for acting as
members of the IAC.
requirements.object: affairs of the ARC in any manner and should not receive any pecuniary benefit from the ARC except for the services rendered for

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The IAC shall, after assessment of the financial position of the borrower, time frame
available for recovery of the debt from the borrower, future prospects of the business
of the borrower and other relevant aspects, recommend to the ARC that it may resort
to change in or takeover of the management of the business of the borrower and that
such action would be necessary for effective running of the business leading to
recovery of its dues.
requirements.object: the financial position of the borrower, time frame available for recovery of the debt from the borrower, future prospects of the

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The Board of Directors including at least two independent directors of the ARC should
deliberate on the recommendations of the IAC and consider the various options
available for the recovery of dues before deciding whether under the existing
circumstances, the change in or takeover of the management of the business of the
borrower is necessary and the decision shall be specifically included in the minutes.
requirements.object: the minutes

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC shall give a notice of 60 days to the borrower indicating its intention to effect
change in or takeover of the management of the business of the borrower and calling for
objections, if any.
requirements.object: 60 days to the borrower indicating its intention to effect change in or takeover of the management of the business of the borrower and calling for objections

requirements.full_sentence:
The objections, if any, submitted by the borrower shall be initially considered by the
IAC and thereafter the objections along with the recommendations of the IAC shall be
submitted to the Board of the ARC.
requirements.object: the IAC and thereafter the objections along with the recommendations of the IAC shall be submitted to the Board of the ARC

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall pass a reasoned order within a period of 30 days from the date of
expiry of the notice period, indicating the decision of the ARC regarding the change in or
takeover of the management of the business of the borrower which shall be
communicated to the borrower.
requirements.object: within a period of 30 days from the date of expiry of the notice period, indicating the decision of the ARC regarding the change

requirements.full_sentence:
No ARC shall take the measures specified in Section 9(1)(b) of the Act, until the
Reserve Bank issues necessary guidelines in this behalf.
requirements.object: in Section 9(1)(b) of the Act, until the Reserve Bank issues necessary guidelines in this behalf

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC shall frame a Board-approved policy, laying down the broad parameters for
rescheduling of debts due from borrowers.
requirements.object: laying down the broad parameters for rescheduling of debts due from borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
All proposals shall be supported by an acceptable business plan, projected earnings
and cash flows of the borrower.
requirements.object: acceptable business plan, projected earnings and cash flows of the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
The proposals shall not materially affect the asset liability management of the ARC or
the commitments given to investors.
requirements.object: liability management of the ARC or the commitments given to investors

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board may delegate powers to a committee comprising any director and/ or any
functionaries of the ARC for taking decisions on proposals for rescheduling of debts.
requirements.object: committee comprising any director and/ or any functionaries of the ARC for taking decisions on proposals for rescheduling of debt

requirements.full_sentence:
In cases, where an ARC has exposure to a borrower in respect of which a resolution
plan is under implementation in terms of the Prudential Framework on Resolution of
Stressed Assets applicable to various Regulated Entities such as Commercial
Banks/AIFIs/SFBs/NBFCs, as amended from time to time, the ARC shall also sign the inter-
creditor agreement (ICA) and adhere to all its provisions.
requirements.object: creditor agreement (ICA) and adhere to all its provisions

requirements.full_sentence:
The ARC shall obtain, for the purpose of enforcement of security interest, the consent
of secured creditors (including ARCs) holding not less than 60 percent of the amount
outstanding to a borrower.
requirements.object: of enforcement of security interest, the consent of secured creditors (including ARCs) holding not less than 60 percent of the

requirements.full_sentence:
While taking recourse to the sale of secured assets in terms of Section 13(4) of the
Act, the ARC shall have the option to acquire the secured assets, either for its own use
or for resale, only if the sale is conducted through a public auction.
requirements.object: acquire the secured assets, either for its own use or for resale, only if the sale is conducted through a public auction

requirements.full_sentence:
Every ARC shall frame a Board-approved policy for settlement of dues payable by the
borrowers which shall, inter alia, cover aspects such as cut-off date for one-time settlement
eligibility, permissible sacrifice for various categories of exposures while arriving at the
<image>
settlement amount, and methodology for arriving at the realisable value of the security.
requirements.object: for settlement of dues payable by the borrowers which shall, inter alia, cover aspects such as cut-off date for one-time

requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement with the borrower shall be done only after all possible ways to recover the
dues have been examined and settlement is considered as the best option available.
requirements.object: all possible ways to recover the dues have been examined and settlement is considered as the best option available

requirements.full_sentence:
The Net Present Value (NPV) of the settlement amount should generally be not less
than the realizable value of securities.
requirements.object: than the realizable value of securities

requirements.full_sentence:
If there is a significant variation between realisable
value of the securities recorded at the time of acquisition of financial assets and realisable
value of the securities assessed at the time of entering into a settlement, reasons thereof
shall be duly recorded.
The settlement amount shall preferably be paid in lump sum.
requirements.object: lump sum

conditions:
Where the settlement
does not envisage payment of the entire amount agreed upon in one instalment
requirements.full_sentence:
Where the settlement
does not envisage payment of the entire amount agreed upon in one instalment, the
proposals shall be in line with and supported by an acceptable business plan (where
applicable), projected earnings and cash flows of the borrower.
requirements.object: and supported by an acceptable business plan (where applicable), projected earnings and cash flows of the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement of accounts pertaining to a borrower, where the aggregate outstanding
principal in the books of transferor/s in respect of all the accounts of the borrower acquired
by the ARC from such transferor/s exceeds ₹1 crore at the time of acquisition by the ARC,
shall be done as per Board approved policy, subject to the following:
(1) Settlement of dues with the borrower shall be done only after the proposal is
examined by the Independent Advisory Committee (IAC) formed in terms of
paragraph 47.
requirements.object: Board approved policy

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The IAC, after assessing the financial position of the borrower, time frame available
for recovery of the dues from the borrower, projected earnings & cash flows of
the borrower and other relevant aspects, shall give its recommendations to the ARC
regarding settlement of dues with the borrower.
requirements.object: the ARC regarding settlement of dues with the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Board of Directors including at least two independent directors or a Committee of
the Board meeting the prescribed criteria, shall deliberate on the recommendations
of IAC and consider various options available for recovery of dues before deciding
whether the option of settlement of dues with the borrower is the best option available
under the existing circumstances and the decision, along with detailed rationale,
<image>
shall be specifically recorded in the minutes of the meeting.
